title: D4vd murder case takes new turn as prosecutors reveal alleged motive before July court hearing and not guilty plea
summary_full: The criminal case involving singer D4vd remains active in California. Prosecutors allege he killed 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez to stop her from exposing an alleged relationship, while the defense strongly denies those claims. Burke has pleaded not guilty, and the court will continue hearing the case, with a preliminary hearing scheduled for July 21, 2026.
